features.title: Code Review & Foundational Improvements
features.description: First-pass code review with bug fixes, dead code removal, dark mode, new Liabilities page, and project documentation.
changes: Removed dead Sidebar.tsx (replaced by AppLayout inline sidebar)
Fixed NavLink root route with `end` prop to prevent always-active state
Moved mobile padding (pt-12) from every page into AppLayout centralised
Added dark mode toggle (Sun/Moon) in sidebar with localStorage persistence
Fixed type safety: removed `as any` casts in AssetsPage
Created LiabilitiesPage with full CRUD (mortgages, loans, credit cards, HECS)
Added Liabilities nav item to sidebar and route to App.tsx

features.title: Setup Wizard, Theme Toggle & Living Expenses Enhancements
features.description: Wizard improvements (remove home/car loan from liabilities, cash vs bank accounts, estimated monthly expenses), theme toggle in nav bar, and expanded living expense categories with custom expense support.
changes: Removed Home Loan and Car Loan from wizard liabilities quick-picks (covered in assets)
Added Cash vs Bank Account selection for cash savings with interest rate support
Replaced detailed wizard expenses step with simple estimated monthly expenses field
Added Light/Dark/Auto theme toggle to top navigation bar (desktop + mobile)
Added Other Insurance under Insurance category
Added Security, Home Improvements, Repairs & Maintenance, Gardening under Housing
Added Medical, Pharmacy, Pet Costs, School Costs under Living category
Added Accounting Fees under Financial category
Added custom expense button to create user-defined expense types
Removed number input spinners globally via CSS
